overview: Enterprise Innovation Portal for managing the full lifecycle of ideas — from raw concepts in the Ideas Lab through the Incubator to live Deployments. Features a glassmorphic dark UI with persistent backend storage, file uploads, and a live dashboard tracking your innovation pipeline.
features: Login with Internet Identity for secure access
Dashboard with live KPI stats and Innovation Lifecycle bar chart
Ideas Lab: create and manage concept cards with photos, descriptions, and resource links
Incubator: register projects with multi-file uploads (PPT, docs, source code)
Daily Mission Log: sequential task tracker with dates and times
Deployment Hub: track live projects with URLs, GitHub links, and engine metadata
Settings: manage profile, photo, connected platforms, and credentials
